untranslatable_reason: Point-and-figure charting with 3-box reversal and formation pattern detection requires specialized chart construction (box sizing, column tracking, X/O patterns) and formation recognition logic that cannot be expressed using the available OHLCV indicators and standard operators. This requires custom point-and-figure chart engine implementation not supported by standard indicator calculations.
translation_notes: Signal requires: (1) Dynamic box value calculation based on price level (AUTHOR_SILENT parameter), (2) Point-and-figure column state tracking (not available via OHLCV), (3) Formation pattern matching (simple buy/sell formations), (4) 3-box reversal detection logic. These are chart-construction primitives rather than indicator-based conditions. Recommend implementing as custom chart type in backtest engine with dedicated P&F pattern detector.
